com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXBaseGraphicObject

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXArc, IXBackshellSymbol, IXCircle, IXCommentSymbol, IXCurve, IXDeviceSymbol, IXDrillPoint, IXElectricalSymbol, IXGraphicDatum, IXGraphicGroup, IXGraphicObject, IXGraphicSymbol, IXGroundSymbol, IXHarnessDiagramRegion, IXPolygon, IXPolyline, IXRectangle, IXRelatedEntityDatum, IXSpliceSymbol, IXSymbol, IXText

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXBaseGraphicObject
    Interface for defining extents for graphic objects.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.awt.geom.Rectangle2D getAbsoluteExtent()
      Get the absolute extent of this diagram object as a rectangle in real world coordinates.

    • Method Detail

      • getAbsoluteExtent

        java.awt.geom.Rectangle2D getAbsoluteExtent()
        Get the absolute extent of this diagram object as a rectangle in real world coordinates.
        Returns:
        absolute extent of this diagram object as a rectangle whose (x, y) as lower left corner.
